about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Aamal Altakeef - Years of experience in the world of HVAC systems
about.companyDescription1: Aamal Altakeef is a leading Saudi company in the field of air conditioning and refrigeration systems, reflecting Saudi Vision 2030 in its work by adhering to the highest standards of professional competence and professionalism. We design and implement HVAC systems in accordance with the highest international standards, in complete compatibility with Saudi specifications and hot desert climate requirements.
about.companyDescription2: We are the authorized distributor in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia for the largest international brands in the HVAC industry such as Toshiba, Midea, and Gree, and we provide products certified by the Saudi Standards, Metrology and Quality Organization (SASO) with original factory warranty.
about.companyDescription3: With Aamal Altakeef, you will get an original product with an approved warranty, a team of qualified technicians trained on the latest technologies, and continuous technical support throughout the year to ensure your comfort and that of your family.
about.missionDesc: Providing integrated air conditioning solutions that combine high efficiency, modern design, and energy savings to meet our clients' needs in the residential, commercial, and industrial sectors.
about.visionDesc: To be the first choice and trusted partner for our clients in air conditioning projects across the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia by providing innovative, smart, and energy-saving solutions.
about.valuesDesc: Commitment to international quality standards and Saudi specifications in all air conditioning projects, while ensuring complete transparency and credibility in all our dealings with our valued clients.
about.ceoStatement1: At Aamal Altakeef, we believe that air conditioning and ventilation systems are not just devices that are arranged, but rather an integrated structural foundation that begins with studying the precise engineering loads and continues with extended operational efficiency. We started with a clear vision aimed at leading and developing the HVAC systems contracting sector throughout the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, committed to providing the finest international systems and applying the most precise construction standards for air ducts and central units.
about.ceoStatement2: We at Aamal Altakeef are here to be the trusted and certified partner for all major residential, commercial, and industrial projects in the Kingdom, always driven by our core values: comprehensive construction quality, full commitment to schedules, and high-level engineering excellence.
about.trustSectionSubtitle: We are one of the first air conditioning companies in the Kingdom to offer integrated services under one roof, with years of experience executing HVAC projects for major companies and institutions
about.trustItem1Title: Specialized Engineering Team in HVAC Projects
about.trustItem1Desc: Our team includes certified Saudi engineers, expert designers, and execution technicians trained on the latest HVAC technologies.
about.trustItem2Desc: We execute our projects in accordance with the latest international standards, with periodic follow-ups and annual maintenance contracts at competitive prices.
about.trustItem3Title: Certified Partnerships with Toshiba, Midea & Gree
about.trustItem3Desc: We are an authorized distributor for the largest international brands to guarantee genuine, certified products with factory warranty and available spare parts.
about.trustItem4Desc: We adhere to project schedules and deliver each stage on time without delay, with full documentation for each step.
about.statsSectionSubtitle: These numbers reflect the depth of experience we have gained from executing diverse and integrated HVAC projects across all regions of the Kingdom.
